---
title: Musée Carnavalet
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779810119/museecarnavalet2_n2kx9w.png
description: Musée Carnavalet Paris
categories: [urbansketch]
date: 2025/10/11
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779810119/museecarnavalet2_n2kx9w.png)
